items.title: Pourquoi les oeufs de Fabergé sont-ils aussi célèbres ?

translation.title: Why are Fabergé's eggs so famous?

items.title: Gabon : l'opposition dénonce une réforme du code de la nationalité sans débat ni vote
items.summary: Au Gabon, une réforme de la nationalité prévoit une classification des citoyens en trois catégories et accorde au Président le pouvoir de déchéance de nationalité. Au Sénégal, Thiès a accueilli un  défilé d'indépendance dédié à la jeunesse avant les JOJ 2026. Et enfin, notre focus brise le tabou des violences gynécologiques et obstétricales. Après le choc d'une vidéo de maltraitance en RDC, la Dre Ndeye Khady Babou nous éclaire sur ce défi majeur pour les droits des femmes.

translation.title: Gabon: Opposition denounces reform of nationality code without debate or vote
translation.summary: In Gabon, a reform of nationality provided for the classification of citizens into three categories and granted the President the power to revoke nationality. In Senegal, Thiès hosted an independence parade dedicated to youth before the Olympics 2026. And finally, our focus breaks the taboo of gynaecological and obstetrical violence. After the shock of a video of abuse in the DRC, Dr. Ndeye Khady Babou sheds light on this major challenge for women's rights.

items.title: Focus sur violences gynécologiques et obstétricales en Afrique
items.summary: Une vidéo choquante venue de RDC relance le débat sur les violences gynécologiques et obstétricales en Afrique. Derrière ce cas, une réalité plus large : des femmes confrontées à des maltraitances dans les soins liés à la grossesse et à l’accouchement. Un enjeu de santé publique, mais aussi de droits humains. Entretien avec la Docteure Ndeye Khady Babou, spécialiste en santé sexuelle et reproductive, engagée pour la reconnaissance de ces violences et leur prise en charge.

translation.title: Focus on gynaecological and obstetric violence in Africa
translation.summary: An shocking video from DRC revives the debate on gynaecological and obstetric violence in Africa. Behind this case, a broader reality: women facing abuse in the care of pregnancy and childbirth. A public health issue, but also a human rights issue. Interview with Dr. Ndeye Khady Babou, a specialist in sexual and reproductive health, committed to the recognition of the violence and its management.

items.title: Iran executes two men as protest-related hangings continue
items.summary: Iran executed two men on Sunday over accusations that they tried to storm a military site and gain access to an armory during the January protests, according to Mizan, the judiciary’s news outlet.

items.title: UAE crackdown could hit Iran’s wider shadow network, experts say
items.summary: The UAE’s recent arrest of IRGC-linked money changers could expand into a broader crackdown on Iran’s shadow financial network, experts said on this week's episode of Eye for Iran podcast.

items.title: Two more political prisoners executed in Iran
items.summary: Iran’s judiciary said two political prisoners were executed on Saturday after their death sentences were upheld, in the latest use of capital punishment in security-related cases.

items.title: Multiple US aircraft downed or damaged in bruising day of losses in Iran war
items.summary: Several US aircraft were shot down or damaged and crews injured on Friday in one of the worst days for the US military in the war with Iran, with search operations ongoing for a missing US aviator in southwestern Iran.

items.summary: Iranian hardliners on Friday branded former foreign minister Mohammad Javad Zarif a “traitor” and accused him of espionage over his call to end the war, with a lawmaker urging the judiciary to arrest him along with former president Hassan Rouhani.

items.title: For Washington and Tehran, negotiations are still part of the war
items.summary: Iran and the United States may prefer an end to the war, but the gap between the minimum terms each side could accept is so wide that a deal remains unlikely for now.

items.summary: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian is facing a fierce political backlash after signaling a conditional willingness to end the war, exposing deep divisions within Iran’s political and military establishment over diplomacy versus continued conflict.

items.title: بحرین از آتش‌سوزی در شرکت صنایع پتروشیمی پس از حمله پهپادی جمهوری اسلامی خبر داد
items.summary:
خبرگزاری رسمی بحرین از آتش‌سوزی در شرکت صنایع پتروشیمی این کشور در پی حمله پهپادی جمهوری اسلامی خبر داد و افزود که هیچ موردی از مصدومیت گزارش نشده است.
پیش‌تر بحرین اعلام کرد آتش‌سوزی در یکی از مخازن شرکت بابکو انرژی که در پی اصابت پهپاد پرتاب شده از ایران رخ داده بود، مهار شد.

translation.title: Bahrain reported fires in petrochemical industry after the drone attack by the Islamic Republic

Bahrain's official news agency reported fires in the country's petrochemical industry following the drone attack on the Islamic Republic, adding that no cases of injury were reported.
Earlier, Bahrain announced that the fire was inhibited in one of the tanks of the energy company Bobko, which had occurred following a drone strike from Iran.

items.title: رییس جمهوری لبنان: سفیر جمهوری اسلامی استوارنامه خود را ارائه نکرده و نقش رسمی ندارد

The Circular states that the Fourth National Agricultural Survey is aimed at rural households in the People ' s Republic of China, including rural agricultural producers and other households; urban agricultural producers; agricultural production units; villagers ' committees; and town and town people ' s governments. The main elements of the census include agricultural production conditions, food and food production, new quality of agricultural productivity, basics of rural development, living conditions of rural residents, etc. The standard time of the census is 2400 hours on 31 December 2026, and the data for the period is annual 2026. items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 中央军委主席习近平日前签署命令，发布《军事设施建设条例》，自2025年8月1日起施行。 条例深入贯彻习近平强军思想，深入贯彻新时代军事战略方针，聚焦服务备战打仗，适应新的领导指挥体制和保障模式，科学规范军事设施建设的基本原则、管理体制、运行机制和工作制度，是军事设施建设工作的重要依据。 条例共11章63条，按照军委管总、战区主战、军种主建的总原则，围绕理顺建设链、管理链、监督链，重点从军事设施建设计划管理、项目审批、工程发包、勘察设计、施工管理、应急建设、安全保密、监督问责等方面，厘清管理权限，优化流程机制，固化实践成果，为提高军事设施建设质量效益和保障能力提供有力法治保障。

items.title: 全国人大常委会启动节约能源法执法检查
items.summary: 新华社北京6月5日电 为推动节约能源法全面有效实施，促进更高水平、更高质量做好节能工作，全国人大常委会5日启动节约能源法执法检查。 节约能源法自1998年1月1日实施，并于2007年、2016年、2018年进行了修改。 记者5日从全国人大常委会节约能源法执法检查组第一次全体会议上了解到，为全面深入了解法律实施情况，此次执法检查采取实地检查与委托检查相结合的方式，检查组将赴天津、江苏、湖南、广东、广西、四川等省（区、市）开展实地检查，并委托北京、河北、山西、吉林、上海、重庆等省（市）人大常委会对本行政区域内节约能源法实施情况进行检查。检查组将采取实地检查、听取汇报、组织座谈、典型调研、专题研究、抽查暗访等多种方式，全面准确了解法律实施情况，对带有普遍性的问题深入调查研究。 检查组将重点检查8方面内容：落实节能管理制度情况，推进重点领域节能工作情况，重点用能单位节能管理情况，推动节能技术进步情况，实施节能激励措施情况，与法律配套的行政法规、部门规章以及地方性法规的制定情况，法律实施中存在的其他问题，对节约能源法修改的意见和建议。

translation.title: The Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress initiated an energy-saving law enforcement inspection
translation.summary: In order to promote the full and effective implementation of the Energy Conservation Act and to promote higher and higher-quality energy efficiency, the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress launched an energy conservation law enforcement inspection on 5 June. The Energy Conservation Act has been in force since 1 January 1998 and was amended in 2007, 2016 and 2018. On 5 May, journalists learned from the first plenary meeting of the Standing Committee of the National People ' s Congress ' s Standing Committee on Energy Conservation Law Enforcement Inspection Unit that, in order to obtain a comprehensive and in-depth understanding of the implementation of the law, the inspection took the form of a combination of on-site inspections and commissioned inspections, which will be carried out in the provinces (districts and municipalities) of Tianjin, Jiangsu, Hunan, Guangdong, Guangxi, Sichuan and Beijing, Hebei, Shanxi, Jilin, Shanghai and Chongqing, among others. The Unit will have a comprehensive and accurate understanding of the implementation of the law and will conduct in-depth research and studies on issues of a general nature, in a variety of ways, including on-site inspections, debriefings, organization of talks, typical research, thematic studies, spot-checking and unannounced visits. The Unit will focus on eight areas: implementation of energy-saving management systems; promotion of energy-saving efforts in priority areas; focus on energy-saving management in energy-use units; promotion of technological progress in energy-saving; implementation of energy-saving incentives; development of administrative, sectoral and local regulations in conjunction with the law; other issues in the implementation of the law; and suggestions and recommendations for changes to the energy-saving law.
